name_en: In stock Chane🎶 Vintage CF Chain Bag Black Calfskin
name_cn:
In stock Chane🎶 Vintage CF Chain Bag Black Calfskin
Soft and supple calfskin paired with gold hardware is absolutely exquisite, unique, and independent! Feels like carrying a vintage bag with a story, very stylish 💃❤️
Leather chain, switch between handbag and crossbody, or shoulder bag
Size 22.5 14 7cm
Number A2221
